ddls:
CREATE TABLE "specimens" (
  "accession_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specimen */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the family of the specimen */,
  "genus_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genus of the specimen */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species of the specimen */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the specimen was collected */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the specimen was collected */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the specimen was collected */,
  "locality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the locality where the specimen was collected */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the specimen was collected */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collector who collected the specimen */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the collection location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the collection location */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the specimen */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the specimen */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat where the specimen was collected */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation above sea level where the specimen was collected */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the specimen is stored */,
  "specimen_status" TEXT /* Current status of the specimen */,
  "dna_extracted" INTEGER /* Whether DNA has been extracted from the specimen */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Reference to an image of the specimen */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accession_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimens_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimens_genus_id FOREIGN KEY ("genus_id") REFERENCES genera ("genus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimens_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimens_locality_id FOREIGN KEY ("locality_id") REFERENCES localities ("locality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimens_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("collector_id") REFERENCES collectors ("collector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimens_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimens_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_id") REFERENCES families ("family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimens_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Name of the family */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the family */,
  "kingdom" TEXT /* Taxonomic kingdom to which the family belongs */,
  "phylum" TEXT /* Taxonomic phylum to which the family belongs */,
  "class" TEXT /* Taxonomic class to which the family belongs */,
  "order" TEXT /* Taxonomic order to which the family belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genera" (
  "genus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genus */,
  "genus_name" TEXT /* Name of the genus */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the family the genus belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genus */,
  "subfamily" TEXT /* Subfamily to which the genus belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species */,
  "genus_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genus the species belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species */,
  "subspecies" TEXT /* Subspecies of the species */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author who first described the species */,
  "publication" TEXT /* Publication where the species was first described */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the state belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the county belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "localities" (
  "locality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each locality */,
  "locality_name" TEXT /* Name of the locality */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county the locality belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the locality */,
  "geographic_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the locality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("locality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collectors" (
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collector */,
  "collector_name" TEXT /* Full name of the collector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the collector */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the collector is affiliated with */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the collector */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the collector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "institutions" TEXT /* Institutions the user is affiliated with */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specimen being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the specimen */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the specimen was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("accession_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specimen the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption for the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("accession_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource the permission applies to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specimen the log entry belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed on the specimen record */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("accession_id")
)
